positive: A majestic, intricate celestial fauna composition featuring a stylized phoenix rising from swirling constellations and nebula clouds. The design must be rendered in the style of a high-contrast, elegant linocut woodblock print with metallic gold foil accents. Focus on clean, powerful silhouettes and sharp linework. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, indigo, teal, and striking metallic gold against a subtle off-white background. Composition must be centered and vertically balanced, suitable for printing on apparel. Incorporate elements of flora (stylized crescent moon florals) interwoven with astronomical symbols (constellations, zodiac rings). Cinematic lighting, crisp detail, graphic vector art, ultra-high definition, perfect symmetry.
negative: low quality, blurry, messy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, gradient noise, poorly rendered details, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, duplicate, jpeg artifacts, realistic photograph, messy background, smoke, oil painting
